title: Oairse 6PCS Hanging Plant Pot 13CM Galvanised Planter with Detachable Hook Zinc Plant Pot Vintage Metal Flower Pot Garden Vase Bucket for Indoor Outdoor Balcony Decor
features: Vintage Zinc Planters - Perfect for any modern, party, wedding, farmhouse, and rustic home furnishings thanks to its distressed style and design. A set of 6 metal iron flower pots, colorful and well-made, adds a bright and happy touch to your little terrace garden and fence.

Removable Hooks - Metal iron hanging flower pots with detachable hooks easy to hang on your garden fence, saving space, allowing you to decorate your balconies and windows and make the most of your space. These plant pots outdoor made of high quality metal, arranged with anti-rust treatment process which makes them more practical, durable.

Hanging Planter Size - Hanging flowers bucket opening diameter 13cm, bottom diameter 9cm, pot height 12cm, hook length 11cm. These flower pots indoor are suitable for dried flowers, silk flowers, and small potted plants in balcony. Different color hanging plant pots with different plants and flowers brings you a good mood and gorgeous environment.
Great for Small Plant - This planter is great for small, trailing or clump forming plants, hold colorful flowers, Violas, herbs, peppers, strawberry, etc. Give your garden fence a fresh look.

Multiple Application - Hanging plant pots indoor with any decorations, not only for plants and flowers, but can also be as a storage basket. Will add style and color to your home, desk, balcony, windows, wall, railings, fences, gardens or any place indoors and outdoors, embellishing the atmosphere of a beautiful home.
description: Hanging Planter with Removable Hook - Vintage Rust Metal Plant Pot for Garden and Indoor Decor Add rustic charm to your space with this vintage-style hanging planter, featuring a removable hook for easy placement on balcony railings, fences, windows, garden walls, or indoor spaces. The faux-aged rust finish gives it a timeless weathered look, perfect for farmhouse, cottage, or industrial decor styles. Crafted from durable metal, this hanging flower pot is ideal for artificial plants, herbs, or seasonal decorations. Whether used indoors or outdoors, it brings texture and character without the need for constant maintenance. The detachable hook design allows flexible placement - use it as a wall-mounted planter, a railing basket, or even as a tabletop pot by removing the hook. Its compact size makes it suitable for small spaces while still offering plenty of decorative impact. Perfect for sprucing up balconies, patios, kitchens, hallways, bathrooms, or home offices with greenery or dried arrangements. Also great as a housewarming gift for plant lovers and vintage decor enthusiasts. Specifications: Material: metal Size: Pot height 4.7"/12cm, top diameter 5.1"/13cm, bottom diameter 3.5"/9cm, hook height 4.3"/11cm Quantity: 6pc hanging planter with removable hook
